prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次约73→62→240→173→72名，波动较大；2023年出现异常高值240名后，2024年回落至173名，2025年大幅回升至72名，接近2021–2022年水平。2025年基准位次约72名；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年40人、2022年41人、2023年41人、2024年40人、2025年47人；2026年计划大幅扩招至64人，较2025年增加17人（+36%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年位居第1名，属全国顶尖学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及食堂质量、校园管理及校门开放争议，但整体关注度仍极高；抖音综合热度排名第2（高热），短视频曝光量巨大，报考关注度持续升温。2025年声誉中性/混合，未见明显投档断档记录；清华大学拥有大量A+学科（计算机科学与技术、机械工程、材料科学与工程、电气工程、建筑学、工商管理、法学、物理学、生物学等），学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华优势工科专业2024–2026年社会热度持续高热推荐；陕西2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34000人（+19.7%），竞争加剧；清华大学位于北京（非本省），陕西非其生源大省；2025年该校在陕西招生占比约1.84%，属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次72名、2026年大幅扩招36%（缓解竞争）、陕西物理类考生增加约19.7%（加剧竞争）以及清华持续高热度的报考关注，扩招效应略大于考生增量效应，预计最低录取位次小幅后移至约88名，区间68–108名。

- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术）

- 工科试验班（为先书院）（交叉工程等专业）
- 理科试验班（数理类）（数学与应用数学、物理学等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约88名，区间68–108名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（68名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（108名附近）建议以二档工科试验班为主，三档化生类、建筑类作为保底选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 73 → 62 → 240 → 173 → 72, with significant fluctuations; after an abnormal high of 240 in 2023, it dropped to 173 in 2024, and rebounded sharply to 72 in 2025, close to the 2021–2022 levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 72; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi: 40 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 47 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 64, an increase of 17 (+36%) from 2025, which notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many consecutive years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving cafeteria quality, campus management, and gate opening controversies, but overall attention remains extremely high; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 2nd (high heat), with massive short video exposure, and application attention continues to heat up. In 2025, reputation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Tsinghua University has numerous A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Architecture, Business Administration, Law, Physics, Biology, etc.), with top national disciplinary strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Tsinghua have been consistently highly recommended in social popularity from 2024 to 2026; in 2026, Shaanxi physics category candidates number approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing (not within the province), and Shaanxi is not its major source province; in 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.84%, a moderately low level, with no significant regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 72, the significant 36% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 19.7% increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates (intensifying competition), and Tsinghua's consistently high application attention, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. The minimum admission ranking is expected to slightly shift back to about 88, with a range of 68–108.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Automation Category (Automation including Information Management and Information Systems direction)
- Clinical Medicine Category (PUMC) (Clinical Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong Academy) (Artificial Intelligence and other majors)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian Academy) (Cross-disciplinary Engineering and other majors)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Category) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment Category) (Mechanical Engineering including Experimental Class, Vehicle Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Biology Category) (Chemistry, Biological Science, Chemical Engineering and Industrial Bioengineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Architecture, Planning, Landscape) (Cross-disciplinary Engineering and other majors)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong Academy) (Cross-disciplinary Engineering and other majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 88, range 68–108. If ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 68), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Category and Electronic Information Category; if ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 108), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes, with Tier 3 Chemistry and Biology Category and Architecture Category as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 4 → 6 → (no data for 2023) → 21 → 10, fluctuating between single digits and the twenties; after a high of 21 in 2024, it rebounded to 10 in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shaanxi: 2 in 2021, 2 in 2022, 3 in 2024, 3 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 5, an increase of 2 (+67%) from 2025, but the absolute increase is only 2, with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 1st by Soft Science, a top national institution. Although liberal arts are not its traditional strength, its overall appeal is extremely strong; in 2026, reputation is slightly negative (cafeteria and campus management controversies), but it ranks 2nd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with very high application attention; no obvious gaps in admission records; Tsinghua's liberal arts-related disciplines are strong: Law A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A, Journalism and Communication A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, highly matching the liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (slightly hot), economics and finance are divided and wait-and-see; Shaanxi's 2026 history category examinees are about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (+17%) from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, and Shaanxi is not its major source province; the number of liberal arts enrollments is very small (3–5), so regional preference impact is not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 10, a small expansion of 2 in 2026 (limited absolute increase), and an approximately 17% increase in Shaanxi history category examinees (intensified competition), the expansion effect and examinee increase effect roughly offset each other. The minimum admission ranking is expected to stabilize at about 14, with a range of 4–24.

- Law Class (Law including International Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 14, range 4–24. Tsinghua's liberal arts enrollment quota in Shaanxi is extremely small (only 5), making ranking competition very intense. Within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Economics, Management, Law, Xinya, etc.) and aim for Economics and Finance (International Class) as a stretch; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 4), focus on Economics and Finance (International Class); if ranking is near the upper limit (around 24), evaluate cautiously and consider other universities as safety options.
